nasb.text: Now Amaziah strengthened himself and led his people forth, and went to the Valley of Salt and struck down 10,000 of the sons of Seir.

esv.text: But Amaziah took courage and led out his people and went to the Valley of Salt and struck down 10,000 men of Seir.

cnv.text: 亞瑪謝鼓起勇氣，率領他的人民到鹽谷去，擊殺了一萬西珥人。

ccb.text: 亚玛谢鼓起勇气，率领本国军队去盐谷，杀了一万西珥人，
